name: Witchcrafter Hisho - Madame
desc:
​2 Spellcaster monsters, include WIND monsters
If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can send 1 "Witchcrafter" Spell from your Deck to the GY; this effect becomes that Spell's effect when that card is activated. (Quick Effect): You can target cards on the field, up to the number of "Witchcrafter" Spell/Trap cards in your GY; return them and this card to the hand. You can only use each effect of "Witchcrafter Hisho - Madame" once per turn.
